prompt: This is a high-card board with limited draw pressure. Choose the best action.
why_v1: High-card textures let strong value hands press before later cards create noise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. High-card texture supports a value raise.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Start from the high-card texture: with limited draw pressure and a clean value edge, this spot leans toward a raise before later cards muddy the story.
